name: Product Manager Profile
description: Strategy-focused PM interested in building products that matter

profile.interests: product strategy, user psychology, business models, analytics, innovation
profile.values: impact, collaboration, driving change, continuous learning
profile.hardSkills: product roadmapping, data analysis, SQL basics, market research, storytelling
profile.softSkills: leadership, communication, negotiation, strategic thinking, empathy
profile.riskTolerance: medium — willing to take informed risks
profile.geographicPreference: flexible — open to major tech hubs
profile.education: Bachelor's in Business, Engineering, or related field
profile.purposePriorities: solving real user problems, building products people love, leading high-impact initiatives
profile.burnoutConcerns: feature factory mentality, no clear strategy, misaligned stakeholders
